## Bug Fixes

* Reject punctuation-only tokens as species names (fixes queries like `===` silently returning no matches instead of a query error) — Fixes #1
* Skip all leading `!` when parsing commented-out reactions, so `!!`/`!!!`-commented lines are found with `-c` — Fixes #3
* Match reversible reactions (`<=>` or `=`) in either direction, so an anchored or directional query no longer misses a reaction spelled the "other way around" — Fixes #7

## Documentation

* Build and attach the Doxygen PDF manual to release archives — Fixes #2
* Add Neovim manual install instructions to the vim plugin README
* Document reversible-reaction matching in the README and user guide

## CI/Build

* Group auto-generated release notes by PR label
* Drop the redundant, unpackaged binary upload from the build workflow
* Fix a Windows build failure (`std::filesystem::path::c_str()` returns `wchar_t*` there, not `char*`)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tdinelli/ckgrep/compare/v1.1.0...v1.1.1
